title: Trump threatens to bomb bridges and power plants unless Iran resumes talks
summary_full: Trump's comments aired as the two countries exchanged fire for the fourth day in a row and the US resumed blockading Iranian ports.
summary_public: Trump's comments aired as the two countries exchanged fire for the fourth day in a row and the US resumed blockading Iranian ports.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump threatens to bomb bridges and power plants unless Iran resumes talks
